headline: Tesla (TSLA) Faces New Robotaxi Safety Questions From Federal Regulators
summary: Federal regulators have raised new safety concerns about how autonomous vehicles interact with first responders, adding pressure on Tesla's robotaxi ambitions. The National Highway Traffic Safety Administration, several U.S. Senators, and some states are evaluating tighter rules and potential limits on autonomous vehicle rollouts. These questions arrive as Tesla (NasdaqGS:TSLA) expands robotaxi operations and autonomous features that are central to its long term autonomy goals. Tesla is...
